languages.original_text: "I don't think the problem is due to a lack of ordinary Tech-Priests. These cogitators have been here longer than I've been alive, and no one has ever worked out exactly what it is that disturbs them so deeply."

languages.text: "Не думаю, что проблема в нехватке обычных техножрецов. Эти когитаторы находятся тут дольше, чем я живу, и до сих пор никто не разобрался, что именно так глубоко их тревожит".

"I don't think the problem is due to a lack of ordinary Tech-Priests. These cogitators have been here longer than I've been alive, and no one has ever worked out exactly what it is that disturbs them so deeply."
languages.original_text: "Не думаю, что проблема в нехватке обычных техножрецов. Эти когитаторы находятся тут дольше, чем я живу, и до сих пор никто не разобрался, что именно так глубоко их тревожит".

traits.locale_text: "I don't think the problem is due to a lack of ordinary Tech-Priests. These cogitators have been here longer than I've been alive, and no one has ever worked out exactly what it is that disturbs them so deeply."

"I don't think the problem is due to a lack of ordinary Tech-Priests. These cogitators have been here longer than I've been alive, and no one has ever worked out exactly what it is that disturbs them so deeply."

"I don't think the problem is due to a lack of ordinary Tech-Priests. These cogitators have been here longer than I've been alive, and no one has ever worked out exactly what it is that disturbs them so deeply."

languages.text: 「この問題の原因は、普通のテクプリストが不足しているのではないと思います。この思考装置は私が生まれたよりもずっと前からここにあります。そして、何によって彼らに深く不安を与えているのかを、誰も正確に解明したことがありません」
languages.original_text: "I don't think the problem is due to a lack of ordinary Tech-Priests. These cogitators have been here longer than I've been alive, and no one has ever worked out exactly what it is that disturbs them so deeply."

traits.locale_text: 「この問題の原因は、普通のテクプリストが不足しているのではないと思います。この思考装置は私が生まれたよりもずっと前からここにあります。そして、何によって彼らに深く不安を与えているのかを、誰も正確に解明したことがありません。」

languages.text: « Je ne crois pas que le problème vienne d'un manque de technoprêtres ordinaires. Ces cogitateurs sont ici depuis plus longtemps que je vis et personne n'a jamais réussi à comprendre ce qui les perturbe aussi profondément. »
languages.original_text: "I don't think the problem is due to a lack of ordinary Tech-Priests. These cogitators have been here longer than I've been alive, and no one has ever worked out exactly what it is that disturbs them so deeply."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne crois pas que le problème vienne d'un manque de technoprêtres ordinaires. Ces cogitateurs sont ici depuis plus longtemps que je vis et personne n'a jamais réussi à comprendre ce qui les perturbe aussi profondément. »

languages.text: "Ich glaube nicht, dass das Problem auf einen Mangel an Techpriestern zurückzuführen ist. Diese Cogitatoren sind schon länger hier als ich lebe, und niemand hat je untersucht, was genau sie derart stört."
languages.original_text: "I don't think the problem is due to a lack of ordinary Tech-Priests. These cogitators have been here longer than I've been alive, and no one has ever worked out exactly what it is that disturbs them so deeply."

traits.locale_text: "Ich glaube nicht, dass das Problem auf einen Mangel an Techpriestern zurückzuführen ist. Diese Cogitatoren sind schon länger hier als ich lebe, und niemand hat je untersucht, was genau sie derart stört."

languages.text: "Sorunun sıradan Tekno Rahiplerin eksikliğinden kaynaklandığını sanmıyorum. Bu kavramsayarlar ben doğduğumdan beri buradalar. Onları bu kadar derinden rahatsız eden şeyin tam olarak ne olduğunu kimse çözemedi."
languages.original_text: "I don't think the problem is due to a lack of ordinary Tech-Priests. These cogitators have been here longer than I've been alive, and no one has ever worked out exactly what it is that disturbs them so deeply."

traits.locale_text: "Sorunun sıradan Tekno Rahiplerin eksikliğinden kaynaklandığını sanmıyorum. Bu kavramsayarlar ben doğduğumdan beri buradalar. Onları bu kadar derinden rahatsız eden şeyin tam olarak ne olduğunu kimse çözemedi."

languages.text: «No creo que el problema se deba a la falta de tecnosacerdotes ordinarios. Estos cogitadores tienen más años que yo, y nadie ha averiguado nunca por qué son tan propensos a fallar».
languages.original_text: "I don't think the problem is due to a lack of ordinary Tech-Priests. These cogitators have been here longer than I've been alive, and no one has ever worked out exactly what it is that disturbs them so deeply."

traits.locale_text: «No creo que el problema se deba a la falta de tecnosacerdotes ordinarios. Estos cogitadores tienen más años que yo, y nadie ha averiguado nunca por qué son tan propensos a fallar».

languages.text: “我认为问题并不在于缺少普通技术神甫。这些沉思者在这里的时间比我的寿命还长，但至今没人能确切弄清到底是什么如此深刻地影响着它们。”
languages.original_text: "I don't think the problem is due to a lack of ordinary Tech-Priests. These cogitators have been here longer than I've been alive, and no one has ever worked out exactly what it is that disturbs them so deeply."

traits.locale_text: “我认为问题并不在于缺少普通技术神甫。这些沉思者在这里的时间比我的寿命还长，但至今没人能确切弄清到底是什么如此深刻地影响着它们。”
